prose:
Oxygen frontier-orbital energies and gap — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (open-shell). Geometry: built from provided xyz file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz`). SCF converged in 7 cycles.
HOMO = -8.8739616 eV
LUMO = -3.5859031 eV

The HOMO-LUMO gap is 5.2880586 eV.
Calculation details: The total electronic energy was -4092.2855 eV.

Files for this run are available in the scratch directory.
